oracleReaderQuery.value: SELECT O.OPPID__C AS OpportunityID, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER__C AS BusOrgID, O.NAME AS OpportunityName, Q.QUOTE_NUMBER__C AS QuoteID, COALESCE(Q.QUOTE_SYSTEM__C, R.NAME) AS QuoteSystem, CASE WHEN Q.STATUS__C = 'Active' THEN 1 WHEN Q.STATUS__C = 'Inactive' THEN 0 ELSE NULL END AS IsActive, O.STAGENAME AS StageName, O.TYPE AS OpportunityType, O.SUB_TYPE__C AS OpportunitySubType, O.SUB_TYPE_MOTION__C AS OpportunitySubTypeMotion, CASE WHEN Q.ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsQuoted, O.ISCLOSED AS IsClosed, O.ISWON AS IsWon, O.REASON_WON_LOST_COMMENTS__C AS ReasonWonLostComments, O.PRIMARY_LOSS_REASON__C AS PrimaryLossReason, O.SOURCING_ADVISOR__C AS SourcingAdvisor, UO.NAME AS OpptyOwner, UO.CUID__C AS OpptyOwnerCUID, O.OPPORTUNITY_OWNER_DIRECTOR__C AS OpptyOwnerDir, UVP.NAME AS OpportunityOwnerVPName, UO.EMAIL AS OpptyOwnerEmail, UO.COUNTRYCODE AS OpptyOwnerCountryCode, UO.GLOBAL_REGION__C AS OpptyOwnerRegion, O.CLOSEDATE AS OpportunityCloseDate, O.SEND_TO_ORDER_DATE__C AS SendToOrderDate, CASE WHEN C.NAME IS NOT NULL THEN C.NAME WHEN O.OTHER_COMPETITOR_NAME__C IS NOT NULL THEN O.OTHER_COMPETITOR_NAME__C WHEN O.OTHER_COMPETITOR_S__C IS NOT NULL THEN O.OTHER_COMPETITOR_S__C ELSE NULL END AS Competitor, O.HASOPPORTUNITYLINEITEM AS HasOpportunityLineItem, O.PRE_DEPLOY__C AS PreDeploy, Q.PRE_DEPLOY_STATUS__C AS PreDeployStatus, Q.PRE_DEPLOY_SELECTED__C AS PreDeploySelected, O.FORECASTCATEGORY AS ForecastCategory, O.CAMPAIGN_CODE__C AS CampaignCode, CP.NAME AS PrimaryCampaignSource, O.CIE_SALES__C AS CIESales, O.MIGRATING_FROM_PRODUCT__C AS MigratingFromProduct, O.SALES_CLASSIFICATION__C AS SalesClassification, O.EXPECTED_ORDER_CREATE_DATE__C AS ExpectedOrderCreateDate, O.SALES_REGION_N__C AS SalesRegion, O.CREATEDDATE AS OpportunityCreateDate, O.LASTMODIFIEDDATE AS OpportunityUpdateDate, Q.CREATEDDATE AS QuoteCreateDate, Q.LASTMODIFIEDDATE AS QuoteUpdateDate, UC.ID AS UltCustID, UC.NAME AS UltCustName, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_MRC__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_MRC__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalNewSalesUSD, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_NET_RECURRING__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_NET_RECURRING__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalNetRecurringUSD, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_NRC__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_NRC__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalNRCUSD, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_CONTRACT_MRC__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_CONTRACT_MRC__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalContractMRCUSD, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_YRC__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_YRC__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalYRCUSD, CAST(CASE WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE = 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_REVENUE__C WHEN O.CURRENCYISOCODE <> 'USD' THEN O.TOTAL_REVENUE__C / CT.CONVERSIONRATE ELSE NULL END AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS TotalRevenueUSD, CAST(SYSDATE AS VARCHAR2(19)) AS xact_timestamp FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.ACCOUNT A ON A.ID = O.ACCOUNTID LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL."USER" UO ON UO.ID = O.OWNERID LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID, NAME FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL."USER") UVP ON UVP.ID = UO.VP__C LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY_QUOTE__C Q ON Q.OPPORTUNITY__C = O.ID LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.RECORDTYPE R ON R.ID = O.RECORDTYPEID LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.ULTIMATE_CUSTOMER__C UC ON UC.ID = A.ULTIMATE_CUST_NAME__C LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.CAMPAIGN CP ON CP.ID = O.CAMPAIGNID LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.COMPETITOR__C C ON C.ID = O.PRIMARY_COMPETITOR_OBJECT__C LEFT JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.CURRENCYTYPE CT ON CT.ISOCODE = O.CURRENCYISOCODE WHERE O.ID IN ( SELECT OPP_ID FROM ( SELECT ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY WHERE LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') OR CREATEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O2.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.ACCOUNT A2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O2 ON O2.ACCOUNTID = A2.ID WHERE A2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O3.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL."USER" U2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O3 ON O3.OWNERID = U2.ID WHERE U2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT Q2.OPPORTUNITY__C AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY_QUOTE__C Q2 WHERE Q2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O4.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.RECORDTYPE R2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O4 ON O4.RECORDTYPEID = R2.ID WHERE R2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O5.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.CAMPAIGN CP2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O5 ON O5.CAMPAIGNID = CP2.ID WHERE CP2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O6.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.COMPETITOR__C C2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O6 ON O6.PRIMARY_COMPETITOR_OBJECT__C = C2.ID WHERE C2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O7.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.ULTIMATE_CUSTOMER__C UC2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.ACCOUNT A3 ON A3.ULTIMATE_CUST_NAME__C = UC2.ID JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O7 ON O7.ACCOUNTID = A3.ID WHERE UC2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UNION SELECT O8.ID AS OPP_ID FROM CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.CURRENCYTYPE CT2 JOIN CRPL_SALESFORCE_CTL.OPPORTUNITY O8 ON O8.CURRENCYISOCODE = CT2.ISOCODE WHERE CT2.LASTMODIFIEDDATE >= TO_DATE('@{pipeline().parameters.OpportunityLastLoadDate}', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) MODIFIED_OPPS ) ORDER BY O.ID
